name: selection
description: Framework-agnostic marquee multi-selection for vertical lists — SelectionProvider + SelectableBlock + SelectionMarquee + useSelection/useMarquee. AutoCAD-style rubber-band (drag-right encloses, drag-left crosses), edge-click select, Backspace bulk-delete, floating count toolbar.
notes: Pure client-side slice — no Convex, no npm deps beyond react-dom (createPortal). Host owns the data and runs onBulkDelete(ids); drop <SelectionMarquee containerRef> on a position:relative surface.
